app.title: Lovejoin
app.tagline: Sigmajoin privacy mixer on Cardano. Hyperstructure.

deposit.rounds_help: Higher rounds = more privacy. Funds the fee shard for future mixes.

withdraw.seedelf_detected: Seedelf address detected. Wallet identity will be hidden after withdraw.
withdraw.seedelf_hint: Use a Seedelf address to hide your wallet identity at the destination.

collateral_provider.down: Collateral provider unreachable. Mix is disabled until it recovers.
